message:
feat(iter): add NditerPlan for N-dimensional iterator layout planning

Implement a complete nditer planning module that computes memory-layout-aware
iteration strategies for N-dimensional arrays, mirroring NumPy's nditer
functionality:

- NditerOrder enum: C-order (row-major) vs F-order (column-major) iteration
- NditerOptions: configuration struct with order and external_loop flags
- NditerPlan: core planner computing compatible strides, element counts,
  linear-to-multi-index conversion (both C and F), and external loop axis
  selection for fused inner-loop iteration
- NditerError: typed error enum for invalid shapes and index violations
- Helper functions: checked_element_count (overflow-safe),
  compatible_nditer_strides, plan_external_loop

Includes 6 comprehensive tests covering C/F stride calculation, multi-index
seeking, external loop axis selection, and error edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
